latest_news.headline: Iran strikes Israeli Haifa oil refinery — first hit on Israeli energy infrastructure
latest_news.text: Iranian missile hits Haifa oil refinery. Energy Minister Cohen says 'no significant damage' reported. First Iranian strike on Israeli energy infrastructure — reciprocal escalation after Israel hit South Pars.

latest_news.headline: Iranian drone crashes into Saudi Samref refinery in Yanbu — oil loading briefly halted
latest_news.text: Iranian drone crashes into Samref refinery (Yanbu). Oil loading halted briefly, resumed after hours. Ballistic missile also intercepted heading toward port. Saudi Arabia intercepts 3 drones in eastern region same day.

latest_news.headline: Israeli officials confirm South Pars attack was coordinated with US — contradicting Trump
latest_news.text: Three Israeli officials tell Reuters South Pars attack was coordinated with Washington. Trump's public denial described as recurring pattern after fuel depot strikes weeks ago. Hegseth also repeats 'we knew nothing'.

latest_news.headline: Israel destroys bridges over Litani River, 968+ killed in Lebanon
latest_news.text: Israeli warplanes destroy bridges over Litani River linking south Lebanon to rest of country. Death toll reaches 968+ (up from 912). Over 1 million displaced. UN says attacks may amount to war crimes.

latest_news.headline: NATO deploys 3rd Patriot battery to Incirlik Air Base
latest_news.text: Turkey announces 3rd NATO Patriot at Incirlik (2 systems now at base + 1 at Kürecik radar). Authorized by NATO AIRCOM Ramstein. Turkey's 2nd-largest NATO army now key air defense hub.

latest_news.headline: 3 Iranian ballistic missiles intercepted over Turkey since war began
latest_news.text: Confirmed: 3 Iranian missiles intercepted over Turkish airspace (Mar 4, Mar 9 near Gaziantep, Mar 13 near Incirlik). NATO air defenses in Eastern Mediterranean operating at sustained tempo.

latest_news.headline: US-Russia-Ukraine peace talks formally paused due to Iran war
latest_news.text: No progress on Ukraine peace since Putin-Trump call (Mar 18). US diplomatic bandwidth consumed by Iran war. Russia benefits from oil price surge reducing economic pressure.

TTP 3-day ceasefire (Mar 20-22) also active. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected — Pakistan warns immediate resume if cross-border attack. Updated 2026-03-19T23:05:45Z

latest_news.headline: Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding, TTP also declares 3-day truce
latest_news.text: 5-day Eid ceasefire (Mar 18-23) holding. TTP separately declares 3-day ceasefire. Qatar welcomes truce. No fighting reported. Post-Eid resumption expected.

changed_signals.de_escalation_watch: WATCH: Day 20 Hour 23. Key new signal: Iran FM Araghchi warns 'ZERO restraint' if infrastructure struck again — major escalation threat. Peace talks on situational pause (Kremlin). Zelensky hints at weekend discussions. Pakistan-Afghanistan ceasefire holding through Mar 23. No new conflict zones. All existing signals stable.

latest_news.headline: Netanyahu: Israel will halt South Pars strikes at Trump's request, Iran can't enrich uranium
latest_news.text: Netanyahu press conference: Israel 'acted alone' on South Pars, will halt energy strikes at Trump's request. Claims Iran can no longer enrich uranium or make ballistic missiles (unverified). Says Israel helping US reopen Strait of Hormuz.

latest_news.headline: EU summit calls for moratorium on strikes against energy and water infrastructure
latest_news.text: EU 27 leaders at Brussels summit call for moratorium on strikes against energy and water infrastructure in Middle East, and reopening of Strait of Hormuz. Oil pulls back from $119 peak.

latest_news.headline: Oil peaks at $119/barrel then pulls back on Hormuz reopening hopes
latest_news.text: Brent briefly surges to $119/bbl on Iran Gulf energy strikes, then falls after Netanyahu says Israel helping reopen Hormuz. Currently ~$114. Record fuel cargo prices globally.

latest_news.headline: Overnight Israeli strikes kill 10 in central Beirut, journalists injured at Litani
latest_news.text: Israel conducts extensive overnight strikes in central Beirut (Bachoura), killing at least 10, no warnings issued. IDF strike at Litani injures 2 RT crew members. Ground operations continue on multiple axes.

latest_news.headline: Russia recruiting 409,000 troops as peace talks suspended
latest_news.text: Russia plans to recruit 409,000 new troops while peace talks suspended. Kyiv says negotiations 'in danger zone.' Zelensky expects new discussions this weekend.

outlook: CRITICAL (Day 20, 01:04 CET) — Hourly scan: (1) No major overnight shifts. (2) Netanyahu says Iran leadership 'not clear' after assassinations — Mojtaba Khamenei hasn't appeared publicly. (3) DOJ disrupts Iranian cyber operation targeting US tech companies/journalists. (4) US MEU deployed to Middle East — NYT suggests potential raids on Iranian islands near Hormuz. (5) Japan PM Takaichi condemns Iran at White House meeting; Trump references Pearl Harbor. (6) Oil ~$114, pulling back from $119 peak. (7) Israel-Lebanon ground invasion ongoing. (8) Russia-Ukraine: peace talks paused, Odesa drone strike injures 3. (9) Pakistan-Afghanistan Eid ceasefire holding through Mar 23.
